{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Sage’s owl
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Sage]] possesses an owl that flies from her shoulder.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4">''Underlord'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
